disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: Study: Sin Nombre hantavirus may be more widespread among PNW rodents - KGW
updates.body_en: Study: Sin Nombre hantavirus may be more widespread among PNW rodents KGW

updates.body_en: Mayday! SA scientists identified hantavirus outbreak in 24 hours The Times of India How South African scientists identified hantavirus on a cruise ship thousands of miles away AP News WHO says 12th person infected with hantavirus detected in the Netherlands Al Jazeera
